title: Close approved squad role-coverage gaps
goal: Remediate approved role-coverage gaps from planning and return a cleaner handoff for execution or further planning.

steps.text: Load the target planning report and machine-readable planning log entry.
Select only AJ-approved role gaps and map each to the smallest sufficient follow-up path: reverse-interview, hiring-gap remediation, bounded pack updates, or explicit defer.

When a role depends on a new or uncertain persona, route through `samwise-persona-hiring` first and use `samwise-persona-hiring-calibration` only when approved closure needs structural artifact updates.
Draft bounded remediation changes with explicit role owners, updated definition of done, and validation checks for the first blocked checkpoint.
Pause for AJ review before applying structural pack, persona, or session updates.
Apply only approved updates and run PersonaKit validation plus squad-planning-log checks, and run hiring-log checks only when hiring artifacts changed.
Write remediation status back into the planning report and planning JSONL stream, including updated role coverage, any related hiring review IDs, and the recommended next session.
If execution-critical role coverage remains missing or low-confidence, stop and route back to planning or hiring rather than handing off to execution.

acceptanceCriteria: Only AJ-approved role gaps were remediated
Each remediated role gap maps to a concrete hiring or artifact update path
New or uncertain persona work produced reverse-interview evidence before execution handoff
Planning report and JSONL entry reflect updated role coverage and next session
Validation and squad-planning-log checks pass after approved updates
Hiring-log checks pass when the remediation path updated hiring artifacts
Execution handoff does not occur while execution-critical role coverage remains missing or low-confidence

verification.text: If the remediation path updated hiring artifacts, run `Scripts/check-persona-hiring-logs.sh` and confirm `PERSONA_HIRING_LOGS_CHECK:PASS`.
Confirm planning report and JSONL entry identify the same updated next session and role-coverage status
